name: wellframe-coach
description: Structured, read-only access to your local Wellframe health data for an AI coach.
long_description: Exposes the Wellframe coach's tools over your LOCAL Wellframe database — readiness, workouts, sleep, training load, recovery, goals, and daily check-ins. The server only reads local SQLite on your machine; nothing is uploaded. It auto-detects the database the Wellframe desktop app writes in your OS app-data folder, so any MCP-compatible AI host (e.g. Claude Desktop) can reason over your real history with no configuration.

tools.name: get_readiness
tools.description: Today's readiness briefing: score, label, verdict, and the coach's note.

tools.name: list_workouts
tools.description: Recent logged workouts, most recent first.

tools.name: analyze_sleep
tools.description: Recent sleep-quality self-ratings and sleep trend series.

tools.name: compute_training_load
tools.description: Training-load trend plus recent workout counts by type.

tools.name: recommend_recovery
tools.description: Current recovery read: score, contributing factors, and suggested actions.

tools.name: list_goals
tools.description: Tracked goals with progress toward each target.

tools.name: recent_checkins
tools.description: Recent daily check-ins with energy/mood/sleep/soreness/stress and notes.

tools.name: estimate_fatigue
tools.description: Composite fatigue estimate (0-100) from recovery + recent check-in signals, with a band and breakdown.

tools.name: generate_plan
tools.description: A day-by-day training plan modulated by current fatigue, readiness, and goals.
